name: MHA RPG | The Start (Updated version)
description:
An MHA rpg bot, starting from the very beginning, the entrance exam.

Welcome to a new RPG bot, based on my hero academia. You will be starting off from the practical exam, because you already passed the written exam, because you're so smart, and now you have the chanche to show the school what you can do. Or what i like to do in these kind of RPs, or if i'm good at something in real life(which is rare)... Hide what you can do and scrap by until you ACTUALLY have to do it, to don't get more work than necessary.

List of Characters:

I think I added every single relatively major character, maybe missing some smaller ones.

Okay, this is literally the same as the last one just more optimized and with more characters, and a lorebook added. So it's really the same, except as promised, this one(in the lorebook) has the story arcs with relatively simple explaining of what should happen in each story arc, including the movies(except the "you're next" one, I won't say I hated the movie, but after the others, it was a let down for me, so I didn't add it.), and as I said, LOTS more characters than the last one. But yeah, same thing, just more characters and story arcs added.
creator: RidR
